title: BEM-876 response changes
objective:
Append to governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM876_PROTOCOL_V14_RESPONSE.md: 
Agreed changes:
- Restore v1.2 executive line as the upper-level frame.
- Keep v1.3 details only as refinements, not replacement.
- Add terminology layer: role-object, internal component, internal contour, working area, task registry, event log, rulebook.
- Add General Director, Director, Worker hierarchy.
- Add rulebook with error conditions, context, decision, approved action, forbidden action, owner, version, source incident, and conflict policy.
- Add scalable task registry instead of GitHub Issues as canonical architecture.
- Add managed shared channel under Curator policy and separate event log.
- Add detailed roadmap IDs to build the actual system.
No issue comments.
